steps.t: Tanathron is in Duillond, near the ovens and the Boot-maker. You should speak with Tanathron about procuring flax fibre for linen shrew-stomping boots…
Flax grows in the grasses along the road to Celondim that leads south from Duillond. You should collect stalks of flax so that Tanathron's precarious …
Tanathron, the weaver, is in Duillond near the ovens. You should bring the flax plants to Tanathron to refurbish his dwindling supply.
Deluraw stands near the ovens in Duillond. You should bring the desired flax fibres to Deluraw, for they are apparently very difficult to come by.
